title: The Fool
overview: Zhou Mingrui wakes up in the body of Klein Moretti. A strange notebook holds the key to a dark power.

title: Beyonder
overview: Klein Moretti joins the Nighthawks and heads off on his first task to find an abducted child.

title: The Notebook
overview: Klein Moretti pursues the Antigonus Family's notebook and faces off against another Beyonder.

title: Magic Mirror
overview: Klein Moretti learns ritualistic magic from Old Neil. Meanwhile, an organization has their eyes on Klein.

title: Hero
overview: A tragedy befalls a passenger ship and Klein Moretti is tasked with solving the mystery.

title: Teacher
overview: Klein Moretti discovers an ancient secret about his teacher, Azik Eggers.

title: Coincidence
overview: When too many coincidences appear, Klein Moretti discovers he may be caught in an elaborate scheme.

title: Losing Control
overview: Klein Moretti is on a mission, and the most dreaded fate that could happen to a Beyonder becomes reality.

title: Party
overview: Klein succeeds in ascending to Sequence 8, but this glorious moment is overshadowed by an event.

title: Clue
overview: Dunn and Klein attend the scene of a possibly supernatural murder of a congressman.

title: Mastermind
overview: Following Klein's suspicions, the Nighthawk investigates what Sharon Khoy is hiding.

title: The Bomb
overview: Lanevus threatens to destroy Tingen, putting the Nighthawks in check.

title: Light
overview: The Nighthawks defend Tingen from evil's descent, and past events are revealed to be more than coincidences.
